title: Stock Radar: Oberoi Realty stock hits fresh 52-week high in July; time to buy or book profits?
summary: Oberoi Realty stock broke out from a bullish pattern, reaching a fresh 52-week high. Experts suggest buying the stock for a target above 2000-2100 levels. The supertrend indicator also triggered a buy call, signaling positive momentum. The stock is trading above key moving averages, indicating a strong uptrend. Analysts recommend a stop loss at 1830 for risk management.
